Ticket - Class in proj4
Implements the Ticket class.
Ticket(double, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for class proj4.Ticket
Parameterized constructor that takes a ticket cost and mutually exclusive pass options.
TicketTest - Class in proj4
 
TicketTest() - Constructor for class proj4.TicketTest
 
toString() - Method in class proj4.Bus
Returns a string representation of the bus in the following format:
Bus:15200, model: minibus, capacity: 12
toString() - Method in class proj4.Driver
Returns a string representation of the driver in the following format:
Driver John Adams, ID:21500, AZ789
toString() - Method in class proj4.Passenger
Returns a string representation of the passenger in the following form:
Passenger Sarah Nash, ID:10001, balance: $5.00
toString() - Method in class proj4.Person
Implement in subclasses.
toString() - Method in class proj4.Route
Returns a string representation of the Route in the following format:
Route: SouthBound, from start to stop.
toString() - Method in class proj4.Ticket
Returns a string representation in the following format:
Ticket#: 1, Monthly Pass: No, Day Pass: No
toString() - Method in class proj4.Train
Returns a string representation of the train in the following format:
Train:250100, model: metro, capacity: 120, numUnits: 5
toString() - Method in class proj4.TransitSystem
Returns a string representation of the Transit System in the following format:
Ashland, 3 vehicles, 15 routes, 50 trips.
toString() - Method in class proj4.Trip
Returns a string representation of the Trip in the following format:
Route: SouthBound, from start to stop, fare: $3.00
toString() - Method in class proj4.Vehicle
Implement in subclasses.
Train - Class in proj4
Implements the Train class.
Train(int, String, int, int) - Constructor for class proj4.Train
Parameterized constructor that takes a vehicle ID, vehicle model, capacity, and number of units.
TrainTest - Class in proj4
 
TrainTest() - Constructor for class proj4.TrainTest
 
TransitSystem - Class in proj4
Implements the TransitSystem class.
TransitSystem(String) - Constructor for class proj4.TransitSystem
Parameterized constructor that gets a city name and initializes empty ArrayLists for vehicles, routes, and trips.
